actions.script:
def fields = [] def maxIndex = 1000 // Safety limit for (int i=0; i < maxIndex; i++) { String pKey = "fieldPath_" + i if (!context.containsKey(pKey)) break
fields.add([ fieldPath: context[pKey], type: context["type_" + i], required: context["required_" + i] ]) } ec.context.put("fieldList", fields)
// Clear session data after successful save ec.web.session.removeAttribute("wizardResultList") ec.web.session.removeAttribute("wizardSchemaName") ec.web.session.removeAttribute("wizardSchemaId")

List wList = ec.web.session.getAttribute("wizardResultList") if (wList == null) wList = [] wList.add([fieldPath:'', type:'string', required:false, depth:0]) ec.web.session.setAttribute("wizardResultList", wList)

label.text: Refine JSON schema structure and validation.
